이사야 22:1.content: The burden of the valley of vision. What ails you now, that you have all gone up to the housetops?

이사야 22:2.content: You that are full of shouting, a tumultuous city, a joyous town; your slain are not slain with the sword, neither are they dead in battle.

이사야 22:3.content: All your rulers fled away together. They were bound by the archers. All who were found by you were bound together. They fled far away.

이사야 22:4.content: Therefore I said, “Look away from me. I will weep bitterly. Don’t labor to comfort me for the destruction of the daughter of my people.

이사야 22:5.content: For it is a day of confusion, and of treading down, and of perplexity, from the Lord, Yahweh of Armies, in the valley of vision, a breaking down of the walls, and a crying to the mountains.”

이사야 22:6.content: Elam carried his quiver, with chariots of men and horsemen; and Kir uncovered the shield.

이사야 22:7.content: Your choicest valleys were full of chariots, and the horsemen set themselves in array at the gate.

이사야 22:8.content: He took away the covering of Judah; and you looked in that day to the armor in the house of the forest.

이사야 22:9.content: You saw the breaches of David’s city, that they were many; and you gathered together the waters of the lower pool.

이사야 22:10.content: You counted the houses of Jerusalem, and you broke down the houses to fortify the wall.

이사야 22:11.content: You also made a reservoir between the two walls for the water of the old pool. But you didn’t look to him who had done this, neither did you have respect for him who planed it long ago.

이사야 22:12.content: In that day, the Lord, Yahweh of Armies, called to weeping, to mourning, to baldness, and to dressing in sackcloth;

이사야 22:13.content: and behold, joy and gladness, killing cattle and killing sheep, eating meat and drinking wine: “Let’s eat and drink, for tomorrow we will die.”

이사야 22:14.content: Yahweh of Armies revealed himself in my ears, “Surely this iniquity will not be forgiven you until you die,” says the Lord, Yahweh of Armies.

이사야 22:15.content: The Lord, Yahweh of Armies says, “Go, get yourself to this treasurer, even to Shebna, who is over the house, and say,

이사야 22:16.content: ‘What are you doing here? Who has you here, that you have dug out a tomb here?’ Cutting himself out a tomb on high, chiseling a habitation for himself in the rock!”

이사야 22:17.content: Behold, Yahweh will overcome you and hurl you away violently. Yes, he will grasp you firmly.

이사야 22:18.content: He will surely wind you around and around, and throw you like a ball into a large country. There you will die, and there the chariots of your glory will be, you shame of your lord’s house.

이사야 22:19.content: I will thrust you from your office. You will be pulled down from your station.

이사야 22:20.content: It will happen in that day that I will call my servant Eliakim the son of Hilkiah,

이사야 22:21.content: and I will clothe him with your robe, and strengthen him with your belt. I will commit your government into his hand; and he will be a father to the inhabitants of Jerusalem, and to the house of Judah.

이사야 22:22.content: I will lay the key of David’s house on his shoulder. He will open, and no one will shut. He will shut, and no one will open.

이사야 22:23.content: I will fasten him like a nail in a sure place. He will be for a throne of glory to his father’s house.

이사야 22:24.content: They will hang on him all the glory of his father’s house, the offspring and the issue, every small vessel, from the cups even to all the pitchers.

이사야 22:25.content: “In that day,” says Yahweh of Armies, “the nail that was fastened in a sure place will give way. It will be cut down and fall. The burden that was on it will be cut off, for Yahweh has spoken it.”
